creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
The script 'sarah' hard-codes the following:

my( $config )     = '/usr/local/etc/sarah.conf';

shouldn't this be configurable through ${PREFIX} ?

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
